metadata.name: Prepare a Statement of Retained Earnings

description: An accountant needs to prepare the statement of retained earnings for the annual report.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the beginning retained earnings balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the prior year's ending balance.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the net income for the current year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the net income from the income statement.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the total dividends paid during the year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the total dividend payments.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the ending retained earnings balance and generate the statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates (Beginning RE + Net Income - Dividends = Ending RE) and produces the formal statement.
